"vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:P/VC:N/VI:N/VA:L/SC:N/SI:N/SA:L"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-835", "name": "Loop with Unreachable Exit Condition ('Infinite Loop')"}], "description": "### Impact

Mermaid v11.14.0 and earlier are vulnerable to a denial-of-service attack when rendering gantt charts, if they use the [`excludes` attribute](https://mermaid.js.org/syntax/gantt.html?#excludes) to exclude all dates.

Example:

```
gantt
  excludes monday,tuesday,wednesday,thursday,friday,saturday,sunday
  DoS :2025-01-01, 1d
```

`mermaid.parse` is unaffected, unless you then call the `ganttDb.getTasks()` (which is called when rendering a diagram).

### Patches

This has been patched in:

- [v11.15.0](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/releases/tag/mermaid%4011.15.0) (see [faafb5d49106dd32c367f3882505f2dd625aa30e](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/commit/faafb5d49106dd32c367f3882505f2dd625aa30e))
- [v10.9.6](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/releases/tag/v10.9.6) (see [a59ea56174712ee5430dfd5bc877cb5151f501a6](https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/commit/a59ea56174712ee5430dfd5bc877cb5151f501a6))

### Workarounds

There are no workarounds available without updating to a newer version of mermaid.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00384, "percentile": 0.30514}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6m6c-36f7-fhxh", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-11T19:36:55Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6m6c-36f7-fhxh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-6m6c-36f7-fhxh"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41150"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-29T15:16:22Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T19:36:55Z", "references": ["https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/security/advisories/GHSA-6m6c-36f7-fhxh", "https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/commit/a59ea56174712ee5430dfd5bc877cb5151f501a6", "https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/commit/faafb5d49106dd32c367f3882505f2dd625aa30e", "https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/releases/tag/mermaid%4011.15.0", "https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid/releases/tag/v10.9.6", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41150", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6m6c-36f7-fhxh"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/mermaid-js/mermaid/security-advisories/GHSA-6m6c-36f7-fhxh", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/mermaid-js/mermaid", "summary": "Mermaid Gantt Charts are vulnerable to an Infinite Loop DoS", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T10:28:49Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-6m6c-36f7-fhxh", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "11.15.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "mermaid"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 11.0.0-alpha.1, <= 11.14.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "10.9.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "mermaid"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 10.9.5"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Mermaid Gantt Charts are vulnerable to an Infinite Loop DoS
